# MAA Fitness Studios

> A unisex fitness studio in Kharagpur, West Bengal — "The Real Power Station." Unlimited equipment access, certified personal trainers, weight-loss classes, and no time restrictions, open 6:00 AM–10:00 PM daily.

MAA Fitness Studios is on the 2nd floor above Yes Bank on Kharida Main Road, Kharagpur, West Bengal 721301, India. The studio is unisex — men and women, beginners and athletes, train side by side on the same floor, coached by trainers who stay on the floor rather than watching from the side.

## Contact
- Phone: +91 76994 34646
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/917699434646
- Address: Yes Bank's 2nd Floor, Kharida Main Road, Kharagpur, West Bengal 721301, India
- Hours: Open every day, 6:00 AM – 10:00 PM
- Website: https://maafitnessstudios.fitexo.in/

## Programs
- Strength & Muscle — free weights, machines, and progressive programs
- Weight-Loss Classes — structured fat-loss classes, included with Silver plans and above
- Personal Training — one-on-one coaching on form, programming, and nutrition
- Cardio & Conditioning — treadmills, cycles, and circuits

## Membership Plans
- Bronze — ₹1,800 (₹1,000 registration + ₹800/month): unlimited equipment access, personal trainer support, no time restrictions
- Silver — ₹2,400 (no registration fee, ₹800 × 3 months): unlimited equipment access, weight-loss classes, no time restrictions
- Gold (most popular) — ₹4,200 (no registration fee, ₹700 × 6 months): unlimited equipment access, weight-loss classes, no time restrictions
- Diamond — ₹7,200 (no registration fee, ₹600 × 12 months): unlimited equipment access, weight-loss classes, no time restrictions

A free trial session is available before joining.

## Trainer
One head trainer covers every discipline at the studio — strength/hypertrophy, fat-loss conditioning, and form fundamentals — coaching on the same floor members train on.

## Site
This is a single-page site. About, Programs, Trainers, Gallery, Membership, and Contact are all sections on https://maafitnessstudios.fitexo.in/
